title: Synthetic Clinical Discharge Summary
text: Synthetic document for portfolio testing only. Patient: Jordan Ellis. Age: 54. Diagnosis: community-acquired pneumonia with mild dehydration. Hospital course: the patient improved after oral antibiotics, fluids, and oxygen monitoring. Discharge plan: complete a five day course of amoxicillin-clavulanate and use an incentive spirometer twice daily. Follow-up: primary care review within seven days, with return precautions for fever, shortness of breath, or chest pain.
